## Checklist

- [ ] Edited the correct `data/*.yaml` file only (one entry per resource).
- [ ] Entry follows the [editorial style](../CONTRIBUTING.md#editorial-style): neutral tone, no marketing language, 400 chars max.
- [ ] `python scripts/build_readme.py --check` passes locally.
- [ ] `README.md` regenerated locally (`python scripts/build_readme.py`) and committed.
- [ ] URL resolves and points to the correct page.
- [ ] Resource has been active in the last 6 months (or 2 years for a lab).
